WELCOME: Welcome to the RedSun RPG Forum, {{name}}
RESTRICTED_CONTENT: Restricted content for authenticated members only.

SUPPORT_SUBTITLE: Share improvements, suggestions, bug reports, and content reports.
SUPPORT_IMPROVEMENTS_TEXT: Constructive criticism is welcome, and we appreciate ideas that can make RedSun clearer, faster, or easier to use.
SUPPORT_SUGGESTIONS_TEXT: Tell us what you would like to see next, what feels missing, or what would make your experience better.
SUPPORT_BUGS_TEXT: If something is broken, include as much information as possible, such as what happened, what you expected, and any steps needed to reproduce it.
SUPPORT_CONTENT_REPORTS_TEXT: You can also report abuse, illegal content, personal data exposure, copyright concerns, impersonation, spam, or other platform misuse. Include the content URL or identifier and a clear description of the concern.
SUPPORT_EMAIL_PROMPT: You can send an email to
SUPPORT_FORM_PROMPT: or fill out the form below:
SUPPORT_MESSAGE_PLACEHOLDER: Share as much information as possible...
SUPPORT_FAILED: Could not send support message. Please try again.
ADD_MEMBER_BY_EMAIL_OR_USERNAME: Add member by email or username
LOGIN_VALIDATION_ERROR: Please provide a valid email and password.
LOGIN_EMAIL_NOT_CONFIRMED: Please verify your email before logging in.

REGISTER_SUBTITLE: Create your account with email and password.
PASSWORD_REQUIREMENTS: Password must be between 8 and 100 characters.
REGISTER_GENERIC_SUCCESS: If the email is eligible, a confirmation link will be sent.
REGISTER_VALIDATION_ERROR: Please check the email and password format.
CHANGE_PASSWORD_VALIDATION_ERROR: Please provide your current password and a valid new password.
CHANGE_PASSWORD_SAME_AS_OLD: New password must be different from current password.
CHANGE_PASSWORD_NOT_AVAILABLE: Password change is only available for email accounts.

CHANGE_PASSWORD_SESSION_REQUIRED: Open a valid password reset link or log in before changing your password.
CHANGE_PASSWORD_RESET_LINK_FAILED: The password reset link could not be used. Request a new link and try again.
CHANGE_PASSWORD_REAUTH_REQUIRED: For security, enter the verification code sent to your email and submit again.
CHANGE_PASSWORD_REAUTH_FAILED: Could not start password reauthentication. Please try again.
VERIFIED_SUBTITLE: Your email is now verified. You can log in.
VERIFIED_FAILED: Email confirmation could not be completed. Please try the link again or log in.
LETTERS_RETENTION_WARNING: All letters are deleted when they reach 60 days old.

POST_DEACTIVATE_WARNING: This action will still be visible to the tale owner but hidden from other players.

LEGAL_PRIVACY_INTRO: This notice explains how RedSun collects, uses, stores, and protects personal data for the RPG forum service, with attention to Brazil's LGPD baseline.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_CONTROLLER_TEXT: RedSun is operated by Átila Oliveira Jr, an independent developer responsible for this service.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_CONTACT_TEXT: Privacy and data protection requests can be sent to dev.atila.oliveira@gmail.com.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_DATA_AUTH: Email address and authentication data managed through Supabase Auth.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_DATA_GOOGLE: Google OAuth profile and email data when you choose to sign in with Google.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_DATA_PROFILE: Username, description, avatar, profile image, and account settings.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_DATA_CONTENT: Tales, locations, posts, letters or messages, contacts, participation records, and related user-generated content.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_DATA_SUPPORT: Support requests, reports, identifiers, contact details, and messages submitted to RedSun.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_DATA_LOGS: Technical and security records related to requests, errors, and sessions when needed to operate and protect the service.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_DATA_LOCAL_STORAGE: Local browser storage values such as cached user profile, language preference, theme preference, and Supabase session data.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_PURPOSE_ACCOUNT: Create, verify, authenticate, secure, and manage user accounts.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_PURPOSE_FORUM: Provide forum features such as tales, locations, posts, contacts, letters, and profile display.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_PURPOSE_SUPPORT: Respond to support requests, privacy requests, content reports, and abuse reports.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_PURPOSE_SECURITY: Prevent misuse, investigate technical issues, protect accounts, and keep the service reliable.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_PURPOSE_COMPLIANCE: Comply with applicable legal obligations and preserve records when required.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_LEGAL_BASES_TEXT: Processing may rely on consent, performance of a contract or preliminary procedures, legitimate interests, compliance with legal obligations, and regular exercise of rights where applicable.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_PROCESSOR_SUPABASE: Supabase may process authentication, database, storage, and session data used by the service.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_PROCESSOR_GOOGLE: Google processes OAuth data when you choose Google sign-in.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_PROCESSOR_INFRA: Hosting, backend, email, and operational providers may process data when needed to run the service; final vendor details must be completed.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_TRANSFERS_TEXT: RedSun is intended to process and store service data in Brazil and does not currently plan international transfers of personal data.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_RETENTION_TEXT: Account data is kept while needed to provide the service or meet legal, security, and dispute-resolution needs. Accounts with no login activity for more than one year may be deactivated. In these cases, login and authentication data, including Google sign-in data where applicable, will be removed or disconnected from the account. Content published on RedSun may be kept without being linked to the original account and shown as an anonymous user to preserve the continuity of tales, locations, posts, and interactions involving other users.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_RIGHT_ACCESS: Request confirmation of processing and access to your personal data.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_RIGHT_CORRECTION: Request correction of incomplete, inaccurate, or outdated data.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_RIGHT_DELETION: Request deletion, blocking, or anonymization of unnecessary, excessive, or unlawfully processed data.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_RIGHT_PORTABILITY: Request portability where technically and legally applicable.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_RIGHT_OBJECTION: Object to processing where allowed by law.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_RIGHT_REVOCATION: Revoke consent where processing is based on consent, without affecting prior lawful processing.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_REQUESTS_TEXT: Use the Data Protection page to request access, correction, deletion, portability, information about sharing, objection, or consent revocation. RedSun may need to verify your identity before acting on a request.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_SECURITY_TEXT: RedSun uses access controls, authentication, transport security, provider security features, and operational review to reduce unauthorized access, loss, misuse, and alteration of data.
LEGAL_PRIVACY_CHILDREN_TEXT: RedSun is not directed to children. The service is intended for users aged 16 or older. If we identify that an account was created by someone below the allowed minimum age, we may deactivate the account and remove or disconnect login and authentication data, while preserving published content anonymously when needed to maintain the continuity of the experience for other users.
LEGAL_TERMS_INTRO: These terms describe the basic rules for using RedSun.
LEGAL_TERMS_SERVICE_TEXT: RedSun is an online RPG forum that lets users create accounts, profiles, tales, locations, posts, contacts, and letters or messages.
LEGAL_TERMS_ACCOUNT_TEXT: You are responsible for providing accurate account information, keeping your credentials secure, and promptly notifying RedSun if you suspect unauthorized access.
LEGAL_TERMS_RESPONSIBILITIES_TEXT: You are responsible for your account activity and for the content you create, send, upload, or make available through RedSun.
LEGAL_TERMS_ACCEPTABLE_USE_1: Do not post illegal, abusive, harassing, hateful, exploitative, or privacy-invasive content.
LEGAL_TERMS_ACCEPTABLE_USE_2: Do not impersonate others, misrepresent affiliation, or expose another person's private data without permission.
LEGAL_TERMS_ACCEPTABLE_USE_3: Do not misuse the service, interfere with security, attempt unauthorized access, spam, scrape, or overload systems.
LEGAL_TERMS_ACCEPTABLE_USE_4: Do not upload content that infringes copyright, trademarks, or other rights.
LEGAL_TERMS_CONTENT_TEXT: You keep ownership of content you create, subject to rights you grant RedSun and rights held by other people or licensors.
LEGAL_TERMS_LICENSE_TITLE: License to host and display content
LEGAL_TERMS_LICENSE_TEXT: You grant RedSun a limited, worldwide, non-exclusive license to host, store, reproduce, display, transmit, and format your content as needed to operate and improve the service.
LEGAL_TERMS_MODERATION_TEXT: RedSun may review, restrict, remove, or preserve content and may suspend or terminate accounts when needed for safety, legal compliance, or service integrity. This does not promise continuous manual moderation.
LEGAL_TERMS_DELETION_TEXT: If an account is deleted or deactivated, login and authentication data, including Google sign-in data where applicable, may be removed or disconnected from the account. Content published on RedSun may be kept without being linked to the original account and shown as an anonymous user to preserve the continuity of tales, locations, posts, and interactions involving other users.
LEGAL_TERMS_AVAILABILITY_TEXT: RedSun may change, limit, suspend, or discontinue features. The service may be unavailable because of maintenance, incidents, provider issues, or changes in project scope.
LEGAL_TERMS_LIABILITY_TEXT: To the extent allowed by applicable law, RedSun is provided without guarantees of uninterrupted availability, error-free operation, or fitness for a particular purpose.
LEGAL_TERMS_PRIVACY_TEXT: Personal data is handled as described in the
LEGAL_TERMS_GOVERNING_LAW_TEXT: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Federative Republic of Brazil. If a dispute related to RedSun arises, the parties should first try to resolve it through the available contact channels. Where applicable law gives the user the right to choose another venue, especially in consumer relationships, those rights will be respected.
LEGAL_DATA_PROTECTION_TITLE: LGPD Contact and Data Subject Rights
LEGAL_DATA_PROTECTION_INTRO: Use this page to understand how to exercise privacy rights related to RedSun.
LEGAL_DATA_PROTECTION_RIGHTS_TEXT: You may request access, correction, deletion, portability, information about sharing, objection to processing, or revocation of consent where applicable.
LEGAL_DATA_PROTECTION_WORKFLOW_TEXT: RedSun will review your request, confirm the information needed to understand it, verify identity when required, and respond through the available contact channel. Exact legal deadlines and escalation steps must be confirmed before final publication.
LEGAL_DATA_PROTECTION_IDENTITY_TEXT: To protect accounts and personal data, RedSun may ask for information needed to confirm that the requester is the account holder or an authorized representative.
LEGAL_DATA_PROTECTION_PRIVACY_TEXT: More details are available in the
LEGAL_REPORT_INTRO: This public page explains how users and non-users can report abuse, illegal content, personal data exposure, intellectual property concerns, impersonation, spam, or other platform misuse.
LEGAL_REPORT_CONTACT_TEXT: Reports may be sent by email to
LEGAL_REPORT_CONTACT_SUPPORT_PREFIX: , or, if you are logged in, through the
LEGAL_REPORT_FIELD_DESCRIPTION: Description of the concern and why you believe action is needed.
LEGAL_REPORT_FIELD_CONTACT: Reporter contact information so RedSun can follow up if needed.
LEGAL_REPORT_FIELD_GOOD_FAITH: Optional good-faith confirmation that the report is accurate to the best of your knowledge.
LEGAL_REPORT_PROCESS_TEXT: RedSun may review reports, ask for more information, restrict access to content, remove content, preserve records, or take account action when needed.
LEGAL_COOKIES_INTRO: RedSun uses browser storage to keep the app signed in, localized, and usable.
LEGAL_COOKIES_STORAGE_AUTH: Authentication token or session values used to keep you signed in.
LEGAL_COOKIES_STORAGE_USER: Cached authenticated user profile data used to load the app quickly.
LEGAL_COOKIES_STORAGE_SUPABASE: Supabase authentication and session behavior required for account access.
LEGAL_COOKIES_TRACKING_TEXT: RedSun does not store information for advertising, tracking, or marketing purposes.
LEGAL_COOKIES_CONTROL_TEXT: You can clear browser storage through your browser settings. Clearing required session storage may sign you out or reset preferences.
